zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine FitzAlan於1306年出生在英國英格蘭素可阿盧德爾 卡素時，她的父親Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel21歲，母親Alice de Warenne19歲。她和Henry Hughes III至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1376年5月2日在英國素可享年70歲，埋葬在英國素可列維斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine FitzAlan于1306年出生在英国英格兰素可阿盧德爾 卡素时，她的父亲Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel21岁，母亲Alice de Warenne19岁。她和Henry Hughes III至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1376年5月2日在英国素可享年70岁，埋葬在英国素可列維斯。

nameMeanings.name: FitzAlan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ ( see Fitz ) + the personal name Alan ( see Allen ), ‘son of Alan’.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

variants.name: Allen
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Alain, Alein (Old Breton Alan), from a Celtic personal name of great antiquity and obscurity. In England the personal name is now usually spelled Alan, the surname Allen; in Scotland the surname is more often Allan. From 1139 it was common in Scotland, where the surname also derives from Gaelic Ailéne, Ailín, from ail ‘rock’. The present-day frequency of the surname Allen in England and Ireland is partly accounted for by the popularity of the personal name among Breton followers of William the Conqueror, by whom it was imported first to Britain and then to Ireland. Saint Alan(us) was a 5th-century bishop of Quimper, who was a cult figure in medieval Brittany. Another Saint Al(l)an was a Cornish or Breton saint of the 6th century, to whom a church in Cornwall is dedicated.
English: occasionally perhaps from the rare Middle English femaje personal name Aline (Old French Adaline, Aaline), a pet form of ancient Germanic names in Adal-, especially Adalheidis (see Allis ).
French: variant of   Allain  , a cognate of 1 above, and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine FitzAlan was born in 1306, in Arundel Castle, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel, was 21 and her mother, Alice de Warenne, was 19. She had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Henry Hughes III. She died on 2 May 1376, in Sussex, England, at the age of 70, and was buried in Lewes, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine FitzAlan est née en 1306, à Arundel Castle, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Alice de Warenne, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Henry Hughes III. Elle est décédée le 2 mai 1376, à Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Lewes, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine FitzAlan 1306 in Arundel Castle, Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel 21 und ihre Mutter Alice de Warenne 19. Sie hatte mit Henry Hughes III mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 2. Mai 1376 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Sussex, England und wurde in Lewes, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine FitzAlan è nata il nel 1306 nel Arundel Castle, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Alice de Warenne, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Henry Hughes III. Morì il 2 maggio 1376, nel Sussex, England, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolta a Lewes, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine FitzAlanが1306年にイギリスイギリススセックスアルンデル カストルで生まれた時，父Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundelは21歳，母Alice de Warenneは19歳であった。彼女はHenry Hughes IIIとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1376年5月2日にイギリススセックスで70歳で死去し，イギリススセックスルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine FitzAlan(이)가 1306년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 아런들 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Warenne(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 Henry Hughes III(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1376년 5월 2일 영국 수세스에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 루스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine FitzAlan nasceu em 1306, em Arundel Castle, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Warenne, tinha 19 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com Henry Hughes III. Ela faleceu em 2 de maio de 1376, em Sussex, Inglaterra, com 70 anos, e foi sepultada em Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine FitzAlan родилась в 1306 г. в местности арундель кастл, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Alice de Warenne, 19. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Henry Hughes III. Она умерла 2 мая 1376 г. в местности суссекс, Англия в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности львесь, суссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine FitzAlan nació en 1306, en Arundel Castle, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Alice de Warenne, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas con Henry Hughes III. Murió el 2 de mayo de 1376, en Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultada en Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra.
